<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Nemolizumab 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Atopic dermatitis (AD)&nbsp;Nemluvio is indicated for the treatment of moderate-to-severe atopic dermatitis in patients aged 12 years and older who are candidates for systemic therapy. Prurigo...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（10 個）：<ul>
<li>diabetic cataract（98.5%）</li>
<li>diabetes mellitus type 2 associated cataract（98.5%）</li>
<li>tetanic cataract（98.5%）</li>
<li>immature cataract（98.5%）</li>
<li>craniostenosis cataract（98.5%）</li>
<li>mature cataract（98.5%）</li>
<li>cortical cataract（98.5%）</li>
<li>nuclear senile cataract（98.5%）</li>
<li>senile cataract（98.4%）</li>
<li>diabetic retinopathy（98.2%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>

</div>
